description: AC-1: the member resolves to ONE enterprise identity from any preserved source-system identifier, with each identifier's provenance intact. AC-2's membership-status display lands with M17 consumers (forward obligation FWD-ID-052-STATUS, docs/contracts/identity-types.md); clinical-record authority stays untouched (crosswalk is read-side).

cases.name: AC-1: the athena identifier resolves to the one enterprise identity
AC-1: the acquired-clinic legacy identifier resolves to the SAME identity
AC-1: an unknown identifier resolves to nothing rather than guessing
